meta.question: Find signals under "_TMT_RecyleBin::01 signals" that are still referenced by active diagrams.
meta.finalAnswer:
Found 13 signals under "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" package:

**APS-TCS signals (4):**
- Receive reply from TCS
- Ask TCS to point telescope to the star
- M3_Status_Position_Query
- M3_Status_Position_Ack

**APS-Internal signals (7):**
- signal_GetK-MirrPos_A
- signal_GetTiltPlate_A
- signal_SelectFilter_Ack
- signal_SelectFilter_Query
- signal_SelectPupilMask_Query
- signal_SelectPupilMask_Ack
- signal_take_expoure_A

**APS-CommonService signals (2):**
- signal_Get_segment_intalled_Ack
- signal_Get_segment_intalled_Query

**Referenced by active diagrams:** None of these 13 signals are referenced by any active diagrams (views). The signals exist in the RecycleBin package but are not used by any diagram contexts in the model.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("01 signals"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("signals"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "01 signals" . 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "01%20signals" . 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("_TMT_RecycleBin"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?child ?childType ?childName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "_TMT_RecycleBin" .
  ?pkg vocab:Package_packagedElement ?child .
  ?child vocab:NamedElement_name ?childName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?childName)), LCASE("01 signals")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?elemName ?owner ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName .
  ?elem vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  OPTIONAL { ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?ownerName)), LCASE("recycle")))
}
LIMIT 50

PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?diagram ?diagramName ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?diagram rdf:type vocab:diagram .

  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?signalQualifiedName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?signalQualifiedName)), LCASE("_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals")))
  ?diagram vocab:Diagram_context ?context .
  ?context vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?signal .
}
LIMIT 50

    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_take_expoure_A>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Query>
  }
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?viewName .
  ?view vocab:Diagram_context ?ctx .
  OPTIONAL { ?ctx vocab:NamedElement_name ?ctxName }
  
  ?ctx vocab:Element_ownedElement* ?elem .
  FILTER(?elem = ?signal)
}
LIMIT 100

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

  }
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?viewName ?ctx ?ctxName WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?viewName .
  ?view vocab:Diagram_context ?ctx .
  OPTIONAL { ?ctx vocab:NamedElement_name ?ctxName }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?ctx)), LCASE("recyclebin")))
}
LIMIT 25

    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/activity/_TMT_RecycleBin::Star%20Acquisition>
